titleStmt.title: SII 17.245: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 245. (A.R. No. 223 of 1904.) MĒLŚĒVŪR, GINGEE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Vṛishabhapurīśvara temple.

This inscription registers a nilaimaitiṭṭu (permanent agreement ?) made in the month of Āṉi of the 13th year, between Erimarundaṉ Arasanārāyaṇaṉ alias Rājarāja Mūvēndara yaṉ and Ērimarundaṉ Meṉmāttaṉ alias Jananātha Mūvēndaraiyaṉ and Śeṅgēṇi Ammai A[ppaṉ] Pāṇḍināḍu-Koṇḍāṉ alias Rājarājach-chambuvarāyar the former two pledging their loyalty to the last mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 10 3 vatu ceṅkeṇi Ammai A
ppaṉ pāṇṭināṭu koṇṭāṉāṉa Irājarājac campuvarāyarkku Erimaruntaṉ Aracanārāya
ṇaṉāṉa Irājarāja muventaraiyaṉum Erimaruntaṉ meṉmāttaṉāṉa jaṉanāta muventa
raiyaṉum Ivviruvom kallu veṭṭikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivarum nāṅkaḷum 10 3 Āvatu Ā
ṉimātattu naṭuviṟ pattiṟ ceyta nilaimaittiṭṭiṉpaṭiye Ivaṟkup piḻaiyāte niṟkak kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi
kkuppiḻaittomākil Eṅkaḷoṭṭai vaṉṉimārkkuc ceruppuṅ kalacappāṉaiyum Eṭukkak kaṭavomā
kavum I kkal veṭṭik kuṭuttom Irājarāja muventaraiyaṉum jaṉaṉāta muventarai
yaṉum Ivviruvom ..
Digital edition of SII 17.245 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
